## Summary

Describe the user-visible behavior or evidence delivered.

Closes #

## Verification

- [ ] Automated tests or deterministic checks pass.
- [ ] User-visible states were verified.
- [ ] Failure and retry behavior were verified where relevant.
- [ ] Documentation was updated.

## Privacy and Security

- [ ] No real logs, prompts, responses, credentials, project paths, or personal reports were added.
- [ ] Data transmission and retention behavior is unchanged or documented below.

## Evidence

List commands, screenshots, evaluation results, or artifacts used to verify this change.
